item.name: Violet Sentry
item.description:
As dreadful as it is, people would be forgiven for mistakenly calling this seabeast the “violent sentry.”

[Suitable for printing on extra large canvases.]

fish.guide: Possessed of powerful jaws and dreadful fangs, this ancient crocodilian beast is said to be a guardian of Shisui of the Violet Tides. Together with the crimson sentry, a gargantuan shark, it protects the palace from would-be interlopers.
